Video.summary: The Indianapolis Drivers take on the Coachella Valley Scorpions in a women's NPL team match.
Video.title: Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)

Image.alt: Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)
Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)
Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Mumbai Pickle Power face off against the Bengaluru Jawans in a high-stakes Tie 9. With Mumbai hunting for their first outright victory and Bengaluru desperate to bounce back from a recent loss, the pressure at the Jio World Garden is at an all-time high. Watch as elite players like the "unstoppable" Katrina Stewart dominate the court in singles, while Brandon Lane and Glaura Carvajal Lane attempt to turn the tide for Mumbai in a masterclass of tactical doubles. This tie features the league’s most innovative strategies, from high-risk Pickle Plays to the pursuit of the prestigious Band of Honor, ensuring every rally is a battle for survival on the road to the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1

Video.summary: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Video.title: NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Mixed)

NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Mixed)
NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Mixed)

Video.summary: Leigh Waters and Anna Leigh Waters take on Parris Todd and Yana Newell in this Women's Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: This episode of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, features a redemption match between the Sarasota Manatees and the Lakeland Palms. Both teams are coming off a loss and are looking for a win in this intense doubles matchup. The Manatees jump out to an early lead, but the Palms, with strong play from players like Ava and Ashley Griffith, manage to crawl back into the game and make it a nail-biting finish. The episode features courtside commentary from Jay Carroll and Hugh Greene.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms

Golden Tate and Eric Decker
Golden Tate and Eric Decker

Video.summary: Watch Senior Pro’s Scott Crandall & Jose Derisi take on Altaf Merchant & Dayne Gingrich in a Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 1

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 1
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 1
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 1

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach at the NCPA Virginia Regional 2025, the University of Virginia (UVA) faces off against High Point University in a crucial pool play match. With a bid to the National Championship in St. Louis on the line, these teams battle through a best-of-seven format.The episode kicks off with Women's Singles featuring Alexandra McDonald (UVA) and Sushi Bandaru (High Point), followed by an intense Men's Singles showdown between Eric Lee (UVA) and High Point's wild card, Freddy Ortmann. The action heats up in Men's Doubles with Cooper Duncan joining Ortmann, and Aiden Eggleston partnering with Lee. Watch for strategic mixed doubles play and see if High Point can force a sudden death dreambreaker.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Video.summary: Parris Todd and Judit Castillo Gargallo face off in the 2023 US Open Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match. A high-stakes showdown of rising stars, intense rallies, and top-tier shotmaking.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo

Video.summary: This Men's Senior Pro Doubles match from the US Open 2025 features the team of Schiller and Weinbach battling Bronson and Coker. The commentary captures crucial moments, strategic missteps, and the competitive flow between these seasoned players, ultimately leading to a clear win for Schiller and Weinbach.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker
US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker
US Open 2025 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Schiller/Weinbach vs. Bronson/Coker

Video.summary: Lily Kordic and Kara Williams take on Nathalie Bagby and Natalija Shaw in this Women's Senior Pro Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, watch a thrilling collegiate pickleball battle between Purdue University and Creighton University. Tied at 2-2 entering the broadcast, this match features intense mixed doubles action that decides the series.Key matchups include Purdue’s Emma Jones and Jay Barath facing off against Creighton’s Russell Lee and Lucy. Later, Purdue’s Caleb Young and Tammy Lamb take on Creighton’s Noah Wodzinski and Elizabeth Cook.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Video.summary: In the exciting championship match of Picklebowl 2023, pro pickleball player Kyle Yates teams up with Picklebowl host and former NFL quarterback Danny Wuerffel to challenge the fierce duo of Anna Bright, a top female pro and former collegiate tennis star, and Ameen Hafez. This charity event brings together athletes and celebrities representing their alma maters in a competitive battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Dave Fleming and special guest Marcellus Wiley highlights the skill, strategy, and drama on court. Watch intense rallies, strategic plays, and hear insider insights as these top players compete for the title. Don’t miss the dynamic energy and social spirit of pickleball in this must-see final.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Video.summary: Watch an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age match featuring the team of Scott Fliegelman and Jillian Braverman against Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote. Scott Fliegelman is a top-10 ranked Senior Pro and co-founder of Boulder Pickleball. His partner, Jillian Braverman, is a well-known professional pickleball player. They face the team of Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote, a pickleball pro and trainer. This match showcases high-level gameplay between four skilled pros.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

Video.summary: The Coachella Valley Scorpions take on the Denver Iconics in a thrilling women’s National Pickleball League showdown from the 2024 season. From powerful baseline drives to lightning-fast net battles, both teams bring competitive spirit and polished teamwork to the court. Whether you're a seasoned fan or new to the NPL, this match showcases the rising talent and intensity of women’s pro pickleball. Every point matters — and momentum can shift in a flash.
Video.title: 2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics

Image.alt: 2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics
2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics
2024 NPL – Women’s Team Match – Scorpions vs Iconics

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group B - 1

Video.summary: Witness one of the most exciting finals from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome. In the Women's Senior Singles Open Final, Team England’s Anna Linton takes on Team Italy’s Paola Tampieri at the iconic Stadio dei Marmi. Linton starts with commanding form, dominating the first game with powerful forehand drives. However, the momentum shifts as Tampieri, fueled by a passionate home crowd, adjusts her strategy to target Linton’s backhand and level the match.
Video.title: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Image.alt: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Video.summary: Step into the electric Jio World Garden in Mumbai for a high-stakes showdown where the road to the playoffs is on the line. Delhi Dilwale enter this tie in second place, looking to solidify their dominance and secure a "Q" next to their name for a guaranteed spot in the semifinals. On the other side, Pune United are fighting for survival, desperately needing a win after finally breaking their season-long drought earlier in the day. Witness intense matchups as tactical veterans like Trang Huynh and Max Mansoor face off against Pune's resilient stars, including the grit of Katie Morris and the power of William Sobeck. In a league where every rally counts toward the "Band of Honor," these athletes must battle both their opponents and the relentless 15-minute clock in a masterclass of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the high-octane energy of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Bengaluru Jawans go head-to-head with the Rajasthan Titans at the iconic Jio World Garden in Mumbai. The stakes are higher than ever in this Day 9, Tie 16 clash, featuring elite matchups such as the "women's singles player of the season" Katrina Stewart facing off against the resilient Lorena Dupnik. Watch as tactical masters like Dusty Boyer and Jack Foster battle for supremacy in a series of intense singles and mixed doubles competitions where every point counts toward the league standings. With game-changing "Pickle Plays" and atmospheric "drums" fueling the intensity, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit and strategic precision.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere of the second "South Indian derby" in World Pickleball League Season 2 as the undefeated table-toppers, Chennai Super Champs, face off against the formidable Hyderabad Superstars. The drama unfolds at Mumbai's Jio World Garden with high-velocity matches, including a premier showdown between unbeaten singles stars Rika Fujiwara and Shawn Mendes. Every rally is a tactical masterclass, featuring the "beast from the East" Lee Hwang Nam in a high-stakes mixed doubles battle against Caitlin Hart and Louis Laville. From "sensational lobs" to the strategic intensity of men's singles, this tie showcases the pinnacle of professional pickleball as both teams fight for dominance on the leaderboard.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League returns for an explosive Season 2 at the iconic Jio World Garden in BKC, Mumbai. The season opener features a high-stakes rematch of last year's final: the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans, owned by cinematic powerhouse Atlee and Priya Atlee, take on the formidable Pune United, led by owner Riteish Deshmukh. Witness world-class athletes from 18 countries compete in a series of intense Men’s Singles, Women’s Doubles, and Mixed Doubles matches. With the pressure of a "Davis Cup" atmosphere and the precision of tactical "kitchen" play, both teams battle for every point to establish early dominance in India’s premier pickleball league.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: The penultimate day of World Pickleball League Season 2 heats up at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden with a high-stakes rematch of last year's semifinals between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru Jawans. The spotlight shines on a "mouthwatering" women's singles clash between two unbeaten titans, Shawn Mendes and Katerina Stewart, where one historic winning streak is destined to end. From tactical mixed doubles experiments to the high-pressure debut of Eduardo Irizarry, every point is a desperate fight to stay "in the hunt" for a final spot. With commentators on the "edge of their seats" witnessing unbelievable defensive plays and "blistering" side outs, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the electric intensity of the "Maharashtra derby" as local rivals Pune United and Mumbai Pickle Power clash at the Jio World Garden in a match hailed as one of the season's best. Mumbai ignites the home crowd with a dominant early lead, fueled by Jada Bui’s emotional victory over a "fearful" Katie Morris and a clinical masterclass from Brandon and Glauca Carvajal Lane in mixed doubles. However, the tide turns in a dramatic "tale of two halves" as Pune United mounts a stunning comeback. Witness the high-power precision of Bolin Bako as he derails Max Green’s momentum, sparking a relentless surge that sees Pune sweep the final three matches to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. This tie is a masterclass in team resilience and tactical pressure under the lights in Mumbai.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
